name: @vorchestra/desktop
description: Local-first visual orchestration for trusted command-line tools.
author: Varun Raj Rana

scripts.package:mac:dir: VORCHESTRA_UNSIGNED_BUILD=1 CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dir --publish never
scripts.package:mac:unsigned: npm run package:mac:unsigned:build && npm run verify:mac:unsigned
scripts.package:mac:unsigned:build: VORCHESTRA_UNSIGNED_BUILD=1 CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.release:mac: npm run release:mac:build && npm run verify:mac:release
scripts.release:mac:build: npm run release:mac:clean && VORCHESTRA_UNSIGNED_BUILD=1 CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never
